tools.name: researchAndBuy
tools.description: Research a token (curve, holders, creator rug flags), then buy if it passes filters. Returns decision + sig.

tools.name: autoSnipe
tools.description: Poll getNewTokens, filter by rug/holder rules, buy each pass with perTradeSol until sessionSpendCapSol is hit.

tools.name: copyTrade
tools.description: Watch a creator/wallet's recent trades and mirror their buys with size scaling.

tools.name: rugExitWatch
tools.description: Monitor held positions; auto-sell when top-holder concentration or dev-wallet sells cross thresholds.
